use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and web applications
Secondary action buttons with outline and ghost variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Loading state support for asynchronous actions
Accessible buttons with focus-visible ring styling
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 5 sizes (default, sm, lg, xl, icon). Includes loading states, optional left/right icons, asChild prop for polymorphic behavior, and accessibility-focused focus-visible rings.
